differential_diagnoses: Kaposi's varicelliform eruption (superimposed on chronic dermatosis)
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of enlarged lymph node for histopathology and flow cytometry
Skin biopsy (repeat/deeper) for T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies
Flow cytometry of peripheral blood for circulating Sezary cells
CT-guided biopsy of the lung mass
Systemic management of erythroderma (fluid balance, temperature regulation, barrier protection)
Continue targeted antimicrobial therapy based on wound cultures

differential_diagnoses: DRESS syndrome (Drug Reaction with Eosinophilia and Systemic Symptoms)
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of inguinal lymph node for histopathology, flow cytometry, and T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement studies
CT-guided core-needle biopsy of lung mass for immunohistochemistry and molecular analysis
HTLV-1 serology and Western blot testing
Peripheral blood flow cytometry for Sézary cell phenotyping
Serum soluble IL-2 receptor level measurement
Bone marrow biopsy and aspiration for staging
Continuation of empiric acyclovir and targeted antibiotic therapy for skin superinfection
Supportive care for erythroderma (temperature regulation, electrolyte/fluid monitoring)
